message: Please upload the required documents for your Dental claim.

required_docs.label: Medical Report
required_docs.description: A document that explains a patient's health condition, diagnosis, and treatment.

required_docs.label: Payment Proof
required_docs.description: Proof of the required payment completion such as a receipt or bank transfer.

required_docs.label: Invoice
required_docs.description: Details of the amount to be paid for services or medications provided to the patient.
